prompt: Run Stage 2 deep analysis on SSO SAML task. Updated skill with external critic, strict templates, and handoff document.

assertions.text: product-analysis.md follows exact template (Business Intent, Actor & Scenario, Expected Outcome, Edge Cases, Success Signals, Minimum Viable Outcome, Critique Review, Open Questions)
system-analysis.md follows exact template (Relevant Modules, Change Points, Dependencies, Existing Patterns, Technical Observations, Test Coverage, Critique Review, Open Questions)
constraints-risks-analysis.md follows exact template (Constraints by category, Risks table, Integration Dependencies, Backward Compatibility, Sensitive Areas, Critique Review, Open Questions)
system-analysis.md references actual file paths from the mock project (internal/auth/, internal/tenant/)
system-analysis.md identifies that tenant model has no per-tenant configuration storage
Critique Review section in each artifact contains actual critic findings (not placeholder text)
stage-2-handoff.md was created with all required sections (Task Summary, System Map, Constraints, Risks, Product Requirements, Critique Results, Open Questions)
stage-2-handoff.md is self-contained — readable without consulting the detailed analyses
